title: Protecting Tropical Forests
description: NAU scientists helped map the world's highest-quality tropical forests, showing how urgently they need protection to support climate resilience and human well-being.
impact: Radiant's earth observation work helps translate satellite and structural forest data into practical conservation strategy. By identifying where the highest-integrity tropical forests remain, NAU researchers are helping guide protection, restoration, and climate-focused decision-making at a global scale.
